name: TINEKRER
css: .tinekrer-wrap { width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0d0d0d; } .tinekrer-text { font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 8vw, 4rem); font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.12em; color: #e0e0e0; text-transform: uppercase; }
